tasks.label: Build BrickGame (raylib)
tasks.command: Get-Process BrickGame -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path '${workspaceFolder}/BrickGame/build' -Force | Out-Null; g++ -std=c++17 -g -Wall -Wextra -IC:/raylib-5.5/raylib-5.5_win64_mingw-w64/include BrickGame/main.cpp BrickGame/Ball.cpp BrickGame/Paddle.cpp BrickGame/Brick.cpp -LC:/raylib-5.5/raylib-5.5_win64_mingw-w64/lib -lraylib -lopengl32 -lgdi32 -lwinmm -o BrickGame/build/BrickGame.exe
tasks.detail: Build BrickGame with raylib (MinGW on Windows)

tasks.label: Build BrickGame Network
tasks.command: Get-Process BrickGame -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path '${workspaceFolder}/BrickGame/build' -Force | Out-Null; g++ -std=c++17 -g -Wall -Wextra -IC:/raylib-5.5/raylib-5.5_win64_mingw-w64/include BrickGame/main_network.cpp BrickGame/Ball.cpp BrickGame/Paddle.cpp BrickGame/Brick.cpp -LC:/raylib-5.5/raylib-5.5_win64_mingw-w64/lib -lraylib -lopengl32 -lgdi32 -lwinmm -lws2_32 -o BrickGame/build/BrickGameNetwork.exe
tasks.detail: Build BrickGame with Network support (MinGW on Windows)

tasks.label: Build BrickGame Network Demo
tasks.command: Get-Process BrickGame* -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path '${workspaceFolder}/BrickGame/build' -Force | Out-Null; g++ -std=c++17 -g -Wall -Wextra -IC:/raylib-5.5/raylib-5.5_win64_mingw-w64/include BrickGame/main_network_demo.cpp BrickGame/Ball.cpp BrickGame/Paddle.cpp BrickGame/Brick.cpp -LC:/raylib-5.5/raylib-5.5_win64_mingw-w64/lib -lraylib -lopengl32 -lgdi32 -lwinmm -lws2_32 -o BrickGame/build/BrickGameDemo.exe
tasks.detail: Build BrickGame Network Demo (MinGW on Windows)
